title: pyrus spinosa var. diapulidis
intro: Pyrus spinosa var. diapulidis, also known as Chinese rowan or Mountain ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Asia, particularly in China and Korea. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pyrus spinosa var. diapulidis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and protecting against oxidative stress and infections. In herbal preparations, the bark, leaves, and berries of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be used to treat various health conditions.
